what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a channel board item via a board:// URI and records when it was added.
observations: YAML front matter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-ab7f669f
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme
The file is purely metadata with no explanatory content
conventions: External board item referenced by board:// URI
concerns: No description of what the attachment contains
notes: A bare channel attachment pointer to board item item-ab7f669f in dragnet-development, recorded with a timestamp.
questions: What content or state does board item item-ab7f669f represent?
Why is this attachment stored as a separate file rather than inline in the board item?
Are there other attachment_type values besides board_items?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose appears to be logging a channel-to-board-item attachment, which matches the metadata it contains.
intention_signals: To record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel and to preserve the time of attachment.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and a board item, supporting attachment traceability without asserting primacy.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file referencing board item item-ab7f669f in dragnet-development and recording its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To log the association of a board item attachment with the dragnet-development channel.
